observation.new_content:
model: ParkingLot
slug: parking_lots
table: parking_lots

options:
  belongs_to_organization: true
  soft_deletes: false
  audit_trail: false
  pagination: true
  per_page: 25

columns:
  name:
    type: string
    nullable: false
    searchable: true
    filterable: true
    sortable: true
  address:
    type: string
    nullable: false
    searchable: true
  total_spots:
    type: integer
    nullable: false
    sortable: true

relationships:
  - type: belongsTo
    model: Organization
  - type: hasMany
    model: ParkingSpot
    dependent: destroy

permissions:
  admin:
    actions: [index, show, store, update, destroy]
    show_fields: "*"
    create_fields: "*"
    update_fields: "*"
  manager:
    actions: [index, show, update]
    show_fields: "*"
    create_fields: []
    update_fields: [name, address, total_spots]
  member:
    actions: [index, show]
    show_fields: [id, name, address, total_spots]
    create_fields: []
    update_fields: []
